overview.zh: 意大利共和国位于欧洲南部地中海地区，呈靴形半岛伸入地中海。是古罗马文明与文艺复兴的发祥地，以艺术、建筑、时尚与美食闻名，是重要的发达经济体。
overview.en: The Italian Republic lies in southern Europe in the Mediterranean, its boot-shaped peninsula extending into the sea. Cradle of Roman civilization and the Renaissance, it is famed for art, architecture, fashion and cuisine, and is a major developed economy.

capitalHistory.zh: 罗马有近三千年历史，曾是古罗马帝国的中心，被誉为'永恒之城'，1871年成为统一后意大利王国的首都，城中保存有大量古迹。
capitalHistory.en: Rome has nearly 3,000 years of history as the heart of the ancient Roman Empire—the 'Eternal City'—and became the capital of a unified Italy in 1871, preserving vast numbers of ancient monuments.

climate.zh: 以地中海气候为主，夏季炎热干燥、冬季温和多雨；北部阿尔卑斯山区偏大陆性与高山气候。
climate.en: Predominantly a Mediterranean climate with hot, dry summers and mild, wet winters; the northern Alpine region is more continental and alpine.

note.zh: 又称《意大利兄弟》，由马梅利作词、诺瓦罗作曲，源自19世纪意大利统一运动。
note.en: Also known as 'Fratelli d'Italia', with lyrics by Mameli and music by Novaro, dating to the 19th-century Italian unification movement.

name.zh: 草莓树莓果（意大利草莓树，传统象征）
意大利狼（半岛代表动物）
name.en: Italian wolf (emblematic animal of the peninsula)

note.en: Italy has won the World Cup four times (1934, 1938, 1982 and 2006).

colorNotes.zh: 绿白红为国旗三色，是国家标志色；红色也象征热情与美食文化。
colorNotes.en: Green, white and red are the flag colors and national signature; red also evokes passion and food culture.

colorNotes.zh: 紫色在传统上与哀悼、宗教斋期相关，喜庆场合较少使用。
colorNotes.en: Purple is traditionally linked with mourning and religious penitential seasons and is used less on festive occasions.

culturalTaboos.zh: 重视家庭、餐桌礼仪与地方传统；用餐时间与咖啡习惯有其讲究。
culturalTaboos.en: Family, table manners and regional traditions matter; meal times and coffee customs have their own etiquette.

formatting.zh: 意大利语名词分阴阳性，形容词随性数变化；日期用 日/月/年。
formatting.en: Italian nouns have grammatical gender and adjectives agree in gender and number; dates use DD/MM/YYYY.

formatting.zh: 数字用句点作千位分隔、逗号作小数点，如 1.234,56。
formatting.en: Numbers use a period as the thousands separator and a comma as the decimal point, e.g. 1.234,56.

funFacts.zh: 传统意大利语字母表仅含21个字母，J、K、W、X、Y主要用于外来词。
funFacts.en: The traditional Italian alphabet has just 21 letters; J, K, W, X and Y appear mainly in loanwords.

funFacts.zh: 意大利是世界上世界文化与自然遗产数量最多的国家之一。
funFacts.en: Italy has one of the highest numbers of UNESCO World Heritage Sites in the world.

label.zh: 联合国教科文组织世界遗产名录
